violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (pepper/onion slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Equipment was cleaned and sanitized during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The coving in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to properly seal the junctures between the wall and the coving tile. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2025
